name: jarvis-node-example
description: Example Node.js project demonstrating Jarvis TUI integration

scripts.dev: echo '🔧 Starting dev server with hot reload...'
scripts.build: echo '🔨 Building production bundle...' && echo '✅ Build complete! Output in ./dist'
scripts.build:dev: echo '🔨 Building development bundle...' && echo '✅ Dev build complete!'
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Running tests...' && echo '   42 tests passed, 0 failed' && echo '✅ All tests passed!'
scripts.test:watch: echo '👁️  Running tests in watch mode... (press Ctrl+C to stop)'
scripts.lint: echo '✅ Linting source files...' && echo '   No errors found.'
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Auto-fixing lint issues...' && echo '✅ Fixed 3 issues.'
scripts.format: echo '🎨 Formatting code with Prettier...' && echo '✅ All files formatted!'
scripts.format:check: echo '🎨 Checking code format...' && echo '✅ All files are properly formatted.'
scripts.type-check: echo '🔍 Running type checker...' && echo '✅ No type errors found.'
scripts.clean: echo '🧹 Removing dist/ and node_modules/...' && echo '✅ Clean complete!'
scripts.audit: echo '🔒 Running security audit...' && echo '✅ No vulnerabilities found.'
scripts.deploy: echo '🚀 Deploying to production...' && echo '✅ Deployment complete!'
scripts.deploy:staging: echo '🚀 Deploying to staging...' && echo '✅ Staging deployment complete!'
scripts.db:migrate: echo '🗄️  Running database migrations...' && echo '✅ Migrations applied!'
scripts.db:seed: echo '🌱 Seeding database...' && echo '✅ Database seeded!'
scripts.logs: echo '📋 Showing application logs...' && echo '[INFO] Server running on port 3000' && echo '[INFO] Connected to database'

author: Luckystrike561
